description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a deep orange color and a dark brown, slightly curved stem at the top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing jack-o'-lantern expression, featuring sharply angled eyes, a jagged mouth, and pointed teeth, giving it a classic Halloween appearance. The surface of the pumpkin is ribbed with vertical grooves, and the skin appears smooth and slightly glossy. The back and sides of the pumpkin are uncarved, showing the natural, uninterrupted pumpkin texture. The interior is hollow, as indicated by the carved openings, and the cut edges are clean and sharp. There are no visible decorative accessories or additional embellishments attached to the pumpkin.
description: A medium, glossy orange pumpkin with a dark brown stem and a sharply carved, menacing jack-o'-lantern face. The surface is ribbed and smooth, with clean cutouts for the facial features.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved jack-o'-lantern face with sharp eyes and a jagged mouth, as well as the dark brown stem.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the smooth, ribbed pumpkin surface and the stem, with only a small portion of the facial cutout visible.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the uncarved, uninterrupted orange pumpkin surface and the stem, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the ribbed pumpkin surface and the stem, with a slight glimpse of the facial cutout on the edge.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled eyes, a jagged mouth, and pointed teeth. The cutouts are clean and geometric, forming a menacing facial expression.
